questions.text: Is it permissible to share temporary JWT tokens or passwords with fellow team members via Slack?
options: True (Yes, provided it's an internal private channel)
False (Never permissible under any compliance circumstance)

questions.text: What protocol must be used for transferring all external customer files?
options: FTP plain transfer on standard port 21
Secure HTTPS / SFTP channels with multi-factor authentication
Physical USB storage mailed via DHL couriers
